result.stdout:
Description:
  Merges all input files into a single output file.

Usage:
  JGUZDV.JsonMerge [options]

Options:
  -in, --input <input> (REQUIRED)     The files to read and merge. The order of the files will be preserved
  -out, --output <output> (REQUIRED)  The file to write the merged output to
  --version                           Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                      Show help and usage information
